tasks.title: Record baseline benchmark scores
tasks.description: Run the benchmark suite on current configuration. Save all 15 task scores and context usage to baseline.json.
acceptance: Pass rate and average score recorded

tasks.title: Rewrite CLAUDE.md to ~80 lines
tasks.description: Replace ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md with the slim version from design doc Section 3.1. Remove workflow docs, BMAD section, model strategy, dev environment, references, philosophy (all redundant with skills/env vars).
acceptance: Contains: Identity, Workflow, Verification, Two-Correction Rule, Research, Critical Gotchas, Compact section
Does NOT contain: Unified Workflow tables, BMAD section, Model Strategy, References, Philosophy
Previous version preserved in git history

tasks.title: Create rules/core.md (always-loaded)
tasks.description: Write new rules/core.md (~60 lines) merging essential content from git.md, consistency.md (slimmed), agent-teams.md (slimmed), self-learning.md (slimmed). Add globs: ['**/*'] frontmatter.
acceptance: Contains git rules (branches, conventional commits, no force push)
Contains agent teams rules (worktree isolation, max 3)

tasks.title: Create rules/frontend.md (path-gated)
tasks.description: Write new rules/frontend.md (~30 lines) merging visual-verification.md and regression-gate.md content. Path-gated to .tsx/.jsx/.css/.html/.vue/.svelte.

tasks.title: Delete merged rules files
tasks.description: Remove 6 rules files whose content is now in core.md and frontend.md: git.md, consistency.md, agent-teams.md, self-learning.md, visual-verification.md, regression-gate.md.

tasks.title: Archive 6 skill directories
tasks.description: Move bmad, reflect, accessibility, docker, meta-rules, voice-chat from ~/.claude/skills/ to ~/.claude/skills-archive/. Verify design-system and backend-architecture remain.
acceptance: design-system and backend-architecture remain in skills/
BMAD skills still work via plugin invocation (not file-based)

tasks.title: Trim hooks from 31 to ~18 entries
tasks.description: Replace the hooks object in ~/.claude/settings.json with the trimmed version from design doc Section 4.2. Remove logging, lifecycle, noise hooks. Keep enforcement, formatting, pipeline gates.
acceptance: PreToolUse: commit check + branch guard + lock files + protect-files + version-prompt
Removed: UserPromptSubmit, Notification, SubagentStop, StopFailure, PostToolUseFailure, TaskCreated, TaskCompleted, WorktreeCreate, WorktreeRemove, TeammateIdle
Removed: auto-fix-loop, command-audit, alert-check, teach-me hooks, read-before-write, test-after-impl, visual-verify-guard

tasks.title: Archive voice tasks and clean dead config
tasks.description: Archive current tasks.json to tasks-archive/voice-system-tasks.json. Evaluate and remove stitch MCP, stale VPS references.
acceptance: Voice system tasks archived to tasks-archive/
VPS sync hook references identified and noted

tasks.title: Run final benchmark and compare
tasks.description: Run full benchmark suite on new configuration. Compare all 15 tasks against baseline. Record results to after.json.
